description: Document, notes, and knowledge-base creation, editing, retrieval, and summarization workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Create a new note or doc
core_tasks.goal: Create a document/note from brief instructions.

core_tasks.title: Summarize a long page
core_tasks.goal: Summarize a document with a concise recap.

core_tasks.title: Extract key decisions
core_tasks.goal: Pull decisions or takeaways from one page or note set.

core_tasks.title: Reformat content
core_tasks.goal: Reorganize or restructure content without losing meaning.

reserve_tasks.title: Build a mini knowledge page
reserve_tasks.goal: Create a structured page with sections and bullets.

reserve_tasks.title: Cross-document synthesis
reserve_tasks.goal: Compare multiple docs and produce a synthesis.

explicit_exclusions: Permissions and sharing workflows as required tasks
Vendor-specific block types as hard requirements
